title: Solomon's Temple, Aizawl Mizoram, India

heroImage.alt: Solomon's Temple, Aizawl Mizoram, India, Mizoram

overview.short: Solomon's Temple is a church located in Aizawl, Mizoram, India.
overview.description: Solomon's Temple is a church located in Aizawl, Mizoram, India. The temple was constructed by the religious group Kohhran Thianghlim, translated as 'The Holy Church' in English. It was founded by Dr. L.B. Sailo in 1984 and is non-denominational.

topPlaces.name: Kohhran Thianghlim
topPlaces.description: Kohhran Thianghlim (The Holy Church) is a Christian denomination in Mizoram, northeast India. It was founded by Dr L.B. Sailo (Lalbiakmawia Sailo) in 1984.

topPlaces.name: Federation Enclave
topPlaces.description: Federation Enclave will be a housing complex located in Aizawl, Mizoram, in northeastern India. It will be built for government employees of the state and will be a collaborative project between the Federation of Mizoram Government Employees & Workers (FMGE&W) and the Government of Mizoram.

topPlaces.name: Mizo Conference of Seventh-day Adventist
topPlaces.description: The Seventh-day Adventist Church in Mizoram is formally organised as the Mizo Conference of Seventh-day Adventist. It is one of the conferences of the Northeast India Union of Seventh-day Adventists under the Southern Asia Division of Seventh-day Adventists.

topPlaces.name: Mizoram State Museum
topPlaces.description: The Mizoram State Museum is in Aizawl, Mizoram, India. It is an ethnographic museum with multipurpose collections on display.

topPlaces.name: Aizwal Mosque
topPlaces.description: Aizawl Mosque is the principal mosque located in Aizawl, the capital of the state of Mizoram, India.

topPlaces.name: Lammual Stadium
topPlaces.description: Lammual Stadium is a football stadium located in Aizawl, Mizoram, India. It is used mainly for football matches.

topPlaces.name: Aizawl
topPlaces.description: Aizawl (English: EYE-zawl; Mizo: [ˈaɪ̯.ˈzɔːl] ), formerly known as Aijal, is the capital city and the most populous city of Mizoram, India. It is also the third largest city in northeast India.

topPlaces.name: Lok Bhavan, Aizawl
topPlaces.description: Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan (translation: Government House) is the official residence of the governor of Mizoram V.K.Singh. It is located in the capital city of Aizawl, Mizoram.

items.note: Kohhran Thianghlim (The Holy Church) is a Christian denomination in Mizoram, northeast India. It was founded by Dr L.B. Sailo (Lalbiakmawia Sailo) in 1984.

Federation Enclave will be a housing complex located in Aizawl, Mizoram, in northeastern India. It will be built for government employees of the state and will be a collaborative project between the Federation of Mizoram Government Employees & Workers (FMGE&W) and the Government of Mizoram.

The Seventh-day Adventist Church in Mizoram is formally organised as the Mizo Conference of Seventh-day Adventist. It is one of the conferences of the Northeast India Union of Seventh-day Adventists under the Southern Asia Division of Seventh-day Adventists.
The Mizoram State Museum is in Aizawl, Mizoram, India. It is an ethnographic museum with multipurpose collections on display.
Aizawl Mosque is the principal mosque located in Aizawl, the capital of the state of Mizoram, India.
Lammual Stadium is a football stadium located in Aizawl, Mizoram, India. It is used mainly for football matches.
Aizawl (English: EYE-zawl; Mizo: [ˈaɪ̯.ˈzɔːl] ), formerly known as Aijal, is the capital city and the most populous city of Mizoram, India. It is also the third largest city in northeast India.
Lok Bhavan formerly Raj Bhavan (translation: Government House) is the official residence of the governor of Mizoram V.K.Singh. It is located in the capital city of Aizawl, Mizoram.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Solomon's Temple, Aizawl Mizoram, India?
faq.a: The best time to visit Solomon's Temple, Aizawl Mizoram, India is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Solomon's Temple, Aizawl Mizoram, India?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lengpui Airport, Aizawl (12 km) and the nearest railway station is Agartala Railway Station (145 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Solomon's Temple, Aizawl Mizoram, India?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Solomon's Temple, Aizawl Mizoram, India at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Solomon's Temple, Aizawl Mizoram, India?
faq.a: Stays in Solomon's Temple, Aizawl Mizoram, India start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Solomon's Temple, Aizawl Mizoram, India?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kohhran Thianghlim, Federation Enclave, Mizo Conference of Seventh-day Adventist, Mizoram State Museum, Aizwal Mosque.
